title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 43.515 - Rulemaking authority, highway patrol criminal record division
text:
43.515.  Rulemaking authority, highway patrol criminal record division. — The central repository, with the approval of the attorney general, shall publish regulations governing the security and privacy of criminal history record information as required by this state and by federal law or regulation.
(L. 1986 H.B. 873 & 874 § 6)
